title: Education
summary: This chapter was merged into Florida Chapter 10: Public Institutions: Religion, Education, and Government. The standalone chapter on education was eliminated and its content compressed into a single chapter alongside religion and government. See Chapter 15 for a detailed comparison.

changes.original_text: Chapter 16: Education was merged into Florida Chapter 10. The standalone treatment of education as a social institution was eliminated.
changes.context: Entire chapter merged with Chapters 15 and 17 into Florida Ch 10. See Chapter 15 comparison for details.
